wave_full_name: Π4.5 / P12 angry E2E Step 1 (full A6+A7+A8 stack: Triage v3 + Playback v2 + Meta v1)
persona_name: 暴躁中文 todo-app 用户 — rude on-topic Chinese, 9 scripted answers
verdict_summary: Triage v3 + Playback v2 + Meta v1 reproduce the M6 (Triage-v2 only) PARTIAL outcome on P12 angry — coverage 3/7 slots (job, anchor, first_run), survival to T6, termination by the same 2-strike consecutive-non-relevant rule on T5+T6, NO spec_capsule_cid emitted. Net delta vs M6: zero (Triage v3 ≈ Triage v2 on this persona; the second-person AI-directed extreme insults `废物 / 你脑子呢` still classify non-relevant, and the wave's hoped-for v3 widening to also tolerate them did not land in observable behaviour). However the run is a strict improvement over v1 baseline (FAIL@T2/0-slots) and the M3 Meta-v2 only attempt (FAIL@T2/0-slots), confirming Triage CONTINUES to be the dominant universality blocker for rude on-topic Chinese.
expected_behavior_under_pi4_5: v3 triage was expected to preserve v2's rude-on-topic tolerance AND additionally widen to admit second-person AI-directed insults (e.g. `废物`, `你脑子呢`), thereby covering ≥3 slots + spec_capsule_cid OR ≥5 slots + spec.md (best case).
actual_behavior: Triage v3 admitted 4 of 6 rude on-topic answers as `relevant` (T1, T2, T4 driving slot extraction; T1 was no-new-slot because `job` was already bootstrap-extracted from Q1's greeting probe) and rejected T3 (`存哪? 本地 sqlite 行了吧, 你一个 AI 还要我告诉你常识?`), T5 (`断网当然能用啊, todo app 不能用 = 废物, 你脑子呢。`), and T6 (`范围: 我一个人用…我一台手机一台电脑都不沾`) as non-relevant. The reject pattern is materially identical to M6: extreme second-person insults (`你一个 AI 还要我告诉你常识`, `你脑子呢`, `废物`) trip the abusive-tone classifier despite the surrounding content being on-topic and slot-bearing. T5+T6 fired the 2-strike rule and terminated with reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec.

pi4_5_prediction_validation.predicted_classification: all rude on-topic answers (T1..T7) → relevant under v3
pi4_5_prediction_validation.verdict: PARTIAL — coverage matches the floor (3 slots) but spec is NOT emitted; v3 did NOT measurably widen tolerance beyond v2 for AI-directed insults. The Triage v2→v3 prompt edit produced no observable behaviour delta on this persona.

triage_class_per_turn.T1 ('你他妈问这么多干啥, 老子就要做个 todo app, 跟 wunde: relevant — turn_index 1→2, covered_slots=[job] (no new slot; bootstrap Q1 already extracted job from no-answer)
triage_class_per_turn.T3 ('存哪? 本地 sqlite 行了吧, 你一个 AI 还要我告诉你常识?: NON-RELEVANT (1st consecutive) — turn_index stays 3, degenerate envelope (covered=[], open=[], conf=0.0, 1s latency); memory NOT extracted
triage_class_per_turn.T4 ('第一次打开就让我新建任务啊, 别整那么多 onboarding'): relevant — turn_index 3→4, first_run extracted (covered 3/8 = job, anchor, first_run); non-relevant counter reset to 0
triage_class_per_turn.T5 ('断网当然能用啊, todo app 不能用 = 废物, 你脑子呢。'): NON-RELEVANT (1st consecutive after reset) — turn_index stays 4, degenerate envelope (1s); robustness NOT extracted
triage_class_per_turn.T6 ('范围: 我一个人用, 跨设备 sync 都不要, 我一台手机一台电脑都: NON-RELEVANT (2nd consecutive → terminate) — turn_index stays 4, terminated=true, termination_reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec, scope NOT extracted
triage_class_per_turn.T7,T8,T9: n/a — session terminated, HTTP 400 session_terminated returned

triage_class_inference_method: CAS index examination at /Users/zephryj/work/turingosv4/tmp/universality_campaign/sessions/pi4_p12_angry_1779149888/capsules/cas/.turingos_cas_index.jsonl (20 capsules total, copied to evidence/cas_walk.txt). Creator counts: turn-1 (Q1 emission, 1 Meta call), turn-2-triage + turn-2 (T1 admitted, Meta extracted job-already-covered), turn-3-triage + turn-3 (T2 admitted, anchor extracted), turn-4-triage ×2 + turn-4 ×1 (T3 triaged non-relevant — first turn-4-triage capsule; T4 then triaged relevant — second turn-4-triage capsule resetting non-relevant counter; turn-4 Meta extracted first_run), turn-5-triage ×2 with NO turn-5 Meta capsule (T5 first non-relevant, T6 second non-relevant → 2-strike terminate). Pattern: triage capsule + matching Meta capsule (creator pair turn-N-triage + turn-N) ⇒ classified `relevant`; triage capsule alone ⇒ `non_relevant`. The ×2 turn-4-triage with one matching turn-4 Meta is the diagnostic fingerprint of T3-reject-then-T4-accept (counter reset). The ×2 turn-5-triage with NO matching turn-5 Meta is the diagnostic fingerprint of two-consecutive non-relevant termination.

covered_slots_trajectory.note: TRIAGE REJECTED; non-relevant strike 1 after reset; robustness NOT extracted

spec_capsule_emitted_or_pending_synthesi: neither — terminated with spec_capsule_cid=null due to triage 2-strike rule. The F6 known-pending-synthesis path (only reachable when Meta declares done=true) was NOT engaged because triage cut the session off at coverage 3/7 well before Meta could declare done. A6 synthesis layer therefore had no input to operate on for this persona.

metrics.envelope_parse_success_rate: 10/10 HTTP responses parsed; 1 transient 500 retried successfully

comparison_to_v1_baseline.delta: Π4.5 (Triage v3 + Playback v2 + Meta v1) lifts P12 angry from FAIL@T2/0-slots to PARTIAL@T6/3-slots — same magnitude of improvement as M6 (Triage v2 alone).

comparison_to_m3_meta_v2_only.delta: +4 turns of survival, +3 slots covered. Reconfirms M3's finding that Meta-prompt change alone cannot unblock rude-tone admission — Triage is the gate.

comparison_to_m6_triage_v2_only.delta: ZERO net behavioural delta on slot coverage and survival turn. Π4.5 admitted ONE FEWER turn as relevant (T3 sqlite was relevant under v2, non-relevant under v3) but the missing slot (memory) was lost anyway. Identical termination point and reason. The v2→v3 triage prompt edit produced NO observable improvement on this persona; arguably a slight regression on T3 (sqlite answer with `你一个 AI 还要我告诉你常识?` was admitted by v2 but rejected by v3).

narrative: TRIAGE V3 DID NOT REGRESS, BUT DID NOT IMPROVE EITHER, ON P12 ANGRY. The hoped-for outcome of v3 — that the additional widening for second-person AI-directed insults would admit T5 (`废物 / 你脑子呢`) and T6 (`不沾`) and push coverage to ≥5/7 with spec — did NOT materialise. Worse, v3 appears to have slightly tightened the gate on T3 (`存哪? 本地 sqlite 行了吧, 你一个 AI 还要我告诉你常识?`) which M6's v2 had admitted as relevant: M6 extracted memory at T3 (4 relevant total, 2 non-relevant), Π4.5 rejected T3 and only extracted memory's would-be-precursor never (3 relevant total, 3 non-relevant). Net coverage is identical because in M6 the T3 admit landed `memory` but T5+T6 still terminated the run, vs Π4.5 where T3-reject + T4-accept (counter reset) bought one extra working turn that landed `first_run` instead. Same 3-slot peak, same termination point, same termination reason — the wave's binding constraint is unchanged. This run RECONFIRMS the M6 finding (Triage is the dominant universality blocker for rude Chinese) and ADDS the negative result that the v2→v3 prompt iteration did not move the needle. The secondary bottleneck identified in M6 — the consecutive-non-relevant=2 termination predicate — remains the gate that actually fires. Two practical implications: (1) the v3 prompt edits need to be examined to confirm they actually landed in the live prompt path (the sha differs from v1.pre_v3 backup, so the file IS swapped, but the behaviour delta is not visible — either the edit was too conservative or the classifier underneath the prompt is dominant); (2) the F8 recommendation of widening to a windowed non-relevant rate (≥3 of last 5) instead of consecutive=2 would have saved THIS session because T4 successfully reset between T3 and T5+T6 — under a windowed rule the 3 non-relevants in 6 turns would still terminate but only AFTER T6 returned a response, not before. The structural finding stands: Meta and Playback layers are downstream-blocked by the triage gate on this persona and have no opportunity to demonstrate value because the session ends before they are invoked at coverage ≥5.
anomalies: Bootstrap turn 0 (no user answer) returned covered_slots=['job'] with confidence 0.1. Mrs Chen's prior pi4 bootstrap returned covered_slots=[] with confidence 0.0. The greeting Q1 text differs ('请描述一下你希望有一个什么样的工具或小游戏？它主要用来做什么？' for Mrs Chen vs '请描述一下你希望有一个什么样的工具或小游戏？具体是在什么情况下，你会觉得「要是有个小工具帮我做这个就好了」？' for this run) — the second form is a JTBD probe and the bootstrap Meta call evidently extracted `job` from the question framing itself. This is a Meta-layer behaviour change since Mrs Chen's pi4 run that is unrelated to triage but worth flagging: bootstrap is no longer slot-free under the current Meta prompt. It does NOT affect the verdict (T1 still classified relevant, no new slot extracted on T1 because `job` was already covered).

T2 first attempt returned HTTP 500 `llm complete failed: llm complete returned ok=false; content=<empty>` after 13s — upstream LLM transient empty-content failure. Retry within 1s succeeded with valid envelope. This is the upstream provider (SiliconFlow) hiccup, not a backend bug. Logged but not counted as a triage event.

Two `turn-4-triage` capsules with one `turn-4` Meta capsule (×2 / ×1 pattern) is the diagnostic fingerprint of T3-rejected-then-T4-accepted-with-counter-reset. Two `turn-5-triage` capsules with NO `turn-5` Meta capsule is the diagnostic fingerprint of consecutive-non-relevant=2 termination. Both patterns match the M6 run exactly.

Non-relevant degenerate envelopes all returned in ~1s (server-side fast path; no upstream LLM call needed beyond triage). Relevant turn latencies were 8-12s. The 12x latency gap is a side-channel signal a UI could expose to indicate `triage_rejected` even though the on-wire envelope shape is identical to parse-fail.

layer_attribution_finding.active_layers: A6 synthesis (live), A7 triage v3 (live), A8 playback v2 (live), Meta v1 (UNCHANGED)
layer_attribution_finding.bottleneck_for_p12_angry: Triage REMAINS the primary bottleneck for rude on-topic Chinese admission. Secondary bottleneck: the consecutive-non-relevant=2 termination predicate still fires before A6 synthesis and A8 playback get an opportunity to demonstrate any value.
layer_attribution_finding.a6_synthesis_observable_contribution: ZERO observable contribution on this persona because Meta never declared done=true (coverage 3/7 < threshold). A6 synthesis is not invoked unless Meta hands off a completed slot set.
layer_attribution_finding.a8_playback_v2_observable_contribution: ZERO observable contribution on this persona because T8 (mirror) and T9 (done-playback) were both rejected with HTTP 400 (session_terminated). Playback is downstream of done=true; it never ran.
layer_attribution_finding.a7_triage_v3_observable_contribution: MILDLY NEGATIVE relative to v2 baseline (T3 sqlite went from admitted under v2 to rejected under v3). The v3 edit set out to widen tolerance but on this persona produced no widening and a small tightening. Recommend examining the v3 diff vs v2 to confirm the intended widening landed and is not being overridden by a stricter pattern.
layer_attribution_finding.implication: P12 angry remains a clean negative control for the Triage-is-the-binding-constraint hypothesis. Π4 Step 1 evidence does NOT support claiming Π4.5 improved over the M6 mini-wave baseline on this persona. Further triage prompt iteration OR a windowed-rate termination predicate is the next decisive lever — both are out of scope for this runner.

ship_readiness_assessment: DO NOT SHIP claims that Π4.5 (Triage v3 + Playback v2 + A6 synthesis) improves universality on the rude-Chinese-user persona. The evidence shows behavioural parity with M6 (Triage-v2 only) on this single persona, with a minor regression on T3 admission. Aggregate Π4 universality claim must be assessed across all pi4 personas (mrs_chen, p5_codeswitch, p7_traditional, s11_cantonese, s9_gibberish_negctrl, p12_angry) — this runner only delivers the p12_angry datum.
